mapper.select:
SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member) AS memberCount,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member WHERE TRUNC(created_at) = TRUNC(SYSDATE)) AS todayNewMembers,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM festival_info) AS festivalCount,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM festival_info WHERE NVL(is_visible, 'Y') = 'Y') AS visibleFestivalCount,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM community_post WHERE NVL(is_visible, 'Y') = 'Y' AND category != 'NOTICE') AS postCount,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM community_post WHERE NVL(is_visible, 'Y') = 'Y' AND category != 'NOTICE' AND TRUNC(created_at) = TRUNC(SYSDATE)) AS todayPostCount,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post_report) AS reportCount,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post_report WHERE NVL(status, '접수') IN ('접수', '검토중')) AS waitingReportCount,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_inquiry WHERE NVL(status, 'PENDING') = 'PENDING') AS waitingInquiryCount,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_inquiry WHERE TRUNC(created_at) = TRUNC(SYSDATE)) AS todayInquiryCount,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM community_post WHERE category = 'NOTICE') AS noticeCount,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM community_post WHERE category = 'NOTICE' AND NVL(is_visible, 'Y') = 'Y') AS visibleNoticeCount
FROM dual

SELECT TO_CHAR(d.base_date, 'MM/DD') AS day, NVL(m.member_count, 0) AS members, NVL(p.post_count, 0) AS posts, NVL(r.report_count, 0) AS reports FROM ( SELECT TRUNC(SYSDATE) - 7 + LEVEL AS base_date FROM dual CONNECT BY LEVEL <= 7 ) d LEFT JOIN ( SELECT TRUNC(created_at) AS created_date, COUNT(*) AS member_count FROM member WHERE created_at >= TRUNC(SYSDATE) - 6 GROUP BY TRUNC(created_at) ) m ON d.base_date = m.created_date LEFT JOIN ( SELECT TRUNC(created_at) AS created_date, COUNT(*) AS post_count FROM community_post WHERE created_at >= TRUNC(SYSDATE) - 6 AND NVL(is_visible, 'Y') = 'Y' AND category != 'NOTICE' GROUP BY TRUNC(created_at) ) p ON d.base_date = p.created_date LEFT JOIN ( SELECT TRUNC(created_at) AS created_date, COUNT(*) AS report_count FROM post_report WHERE created_at >= TRUNC(SYSDATE) - 6 GROUP BY TRUNC(created_at) ) r ON d.base_date = r.created_date ORDER BY d.base_date

SELECT status AS label, COUNT(*) AS count FROM ( SELECT CASE WHEN NVL(is_visible, 'Y') = 'N' THEN '숨김' WHEN TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN event_start_date AND event_end_date THEN '진행중' WHEN TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') < event_start_date THEN '예정' WHEN TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') > event_end_date THEN '종료' ELSE '기타' END AS status FROM festival_info ) GROUP BY status ORDER BY CASE status WHEN '진행중' THEN 1 WHEN '예정' THEN 2 WHEN '종료' THEN 3 WHEN '숨김' THEN 4 ELSE 5 END

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT SUBSTR(addr1, 1, 2) AS region, COUNT(*) AS count FROM festival_info WHERE NVL(is_visible, 'Y') = 'Y' AND addr1 IS NOT NULL GROUP BY SUBSTR(addr1, 1, 2) ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 5

SELECT ROWNUM AS rank, name, region, views, likes, status FROM ( SELECT title AS name, addr1 AS region, NVL(view_count, 0) AS views, NVL(like_count, 0) AS likes, CASE WHEN TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN event_start_date AND event_end_date THEN '진행중' WHEN TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') < event_start_date THEN '예정' WHEN TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') > event_end_date THEN '종료' ELSE '기타' END AS status FROM festival_info WHERE NVL(is_visible, 'Y') = 'Y' ORDER BY NVL(view_count, 0) DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 5

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT 'RPT-' || LPAD(pr.report_id, 5, '0') AS id, pr.reason AS report_type, NVL(cp.title, '삭제되었거나 확인 불가한 게시글') AS target, pr.member_id AS reporter, TO_CHAR(pr.created_at, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') AS report_date, NVL(pr.status, '접수') AS status FROM post_report pr LEFT JOIN community_post cp ON pr.post_id = cp.post_id ORDER BY pr.created_at DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 4

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT 'inquiry' AS type, '새 문의가 접수되었습니다.' AS title, title AS description, TO_CHAR(created_at, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') AS time, CASE WHEN status = 'PENDING' THEN '대기' WHEN status = 'COMPLETED' THEN '완료' ELSE status END AS status, created_at FROM user_inquiry WHERE NVL(status, 'PENDING') = 'PENDING'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'report' AS type, '신고 검토가 필요합니다.' AS title, reason AS description, TO_CHAR(created_at, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') AS time, NVL(status, '접수') AS status, created_at FROM post_report WHERE NVL(status, '접수') IN ('접수', '검토중')
UNION ALL
SELECT 'notice' AS type, '공지사항 노출 상태를 확인하세요.' AS title, title AS description, TO_CHAR(created_at, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') AS time, CASE WHEN NVL(is_visible, 'Y') = 'Y' THEN '노출' ELSE '숨김' END AS status, created_at FROM community_post WHERE category = 'NOTICE' ) ORDER BY created_at DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 4
